questions.question: One of the longest-running shows in TV history, this western was led by Marshal Matt Dillon.
What artist was known as a leader in the Abstract Expressionist movement, but most famous for his "action paintings" that involved drips and splashes?
What early 60s teen idol had hits with "Take Good Care of My Baby" and "Rubber Ball"?
What country's civil war finally ended with a communist victory in 1949?
